'''âd-g-k''' ('''kadagak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forbid|forbid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forbid|forbid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-g-k
|-
! Lemma
| kadagak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidagak|thidagak]] || [[word:jidagak|jidagak]] || [[word:shidagak|shidagak]] || [[word:kidagak|kidagak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudagak|thuthudagak]] || [[word:jujudagak|jujudagak]] || [[word:shushudagak|shushudagak]] || [[word:kukudagak|kukudagak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudagak|thudagak]] || [[word:judagak|judagak]] || [[word:shudagak|shudagak]] || [[word:kudagak|kudagak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudagak|thudagak]] || [[word:judagak|judagak]] || [[word:shudagak|shudagak]] || [[word:kudagak|kudagak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedagak|thedagak]] || [[word:jedagak|jedagak]] || [[word:shedagak|shedagak]] || [[word:kedagak|kedagak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodagak|thothodagak]] || [[word:jojodagak|jojodagak]] || [[word:shoshodagak|shoshodagak]] || [[word:kokodagak|kokodagak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodagak|thodagak]] || [[word:jodagak|jodagak]] || [[word:shodagak|shodagak]] || [[word:kodagak|kodagak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodagak|thodagak]] || [[word:jodagak|jodagak]] || [[word:shodagak|shodagak]] || [[word:kodagak|kodagak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdagak|thĂŠdagak]] || [[word:jĂŠdagak|jĂŠdagak]] || [[word:shĂŠdagak|shĂŠdagak]] || [[word:kĂŠdagak|kĂŠdagak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadagak|thathadagak]] || [[word:jajadagak|jajadagak]] || [[word:shashadagak|shashadagak]] || [[word:kakadagak|kakadagak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadagak|thadagak]] || [[word:jadagak|jadagak]] || [[word:shadagak|shadagak]] || [[word:kadagak|kadagak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadagak|thadagak]] || [[word:jadagak|jadagak]] || [[word:shadagak|shadagak]] || [[word:kadagak|kadagak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadagak|shadagak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadagak|goshadagak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadagak|gokishadagak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadagaknĂŒ|shadagaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadagaknknĂŒ|goshadagaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadagaknĂŒ|gokishadagaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadagakshĂ«|shadagakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadagaknkshĂ«|goshadagaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadagakshĂ«|gokishadagakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadagakro|shadagakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadagaknkro|goshadagaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadagakro|gokishadagakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadagakmu|shadagakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadagaknkmu|goshadagaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadagakmu|gokishadagakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadagaksher|shadagaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadagaknksher|goshadagaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadagaksher|gokishadagaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadagakng|shadagakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadagaknkng|goshadagaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadagakng|gokishadagakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadagakya|shadagakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadagaknkya|goshadagaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadagakya|gokishadagakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadagakyam|shadagakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadagaknkyam|goshadagaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadagakyam|gokishadagakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadagaknĂŒshĂ«|shadagaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadagaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshadagaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadagaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishadagaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadagaknĂŒro|shadagaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadagaknknĂŒro|goshadagaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadagaknĂŒro|gokishadagaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadagaknĂŒmu|shadagaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadagaknknĂŒmu|goshadagaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadagaknĂŒmu|gokishadagaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadagakshĂ«nĂŒ|shadagakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadagaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadagaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadagakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadagakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadagakshĂ«ro|shadagakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadagaknkshĂ«ro|goshadagaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadagakshĂ«ro|gokishadagakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadagakshĂ«mu|shadagakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadagaknkshĂ«mu|goshadagaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadagakshĂ«mu|gokishadagakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadagakronĂŒ|shadagakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadagaknkronĂŒ|goshadagaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadagakronĂŒ|gokishadagakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadagakroshĂ«|shadagakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadagaknkroshĂ«|goshadagaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadagakroshĂ«|gokishadagakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadagakromu|shadagakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadagaknkromu|goshadagaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadagakromu|gokishadagakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadagakmunĂŒ|shadagakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadagaknkmunĂŒ|goshadagaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadagakmunĂŒ|gokishadagakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadagakmushĂ«|shadagakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadagaknkmushĂ«|goshadagaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadagakmushĂ«|gokishadagakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadagakmuro|shadagakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadagaknkmuro|goshadagaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadagakmuro|gokishadagakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
